name: release
description: Bump version, run tests, and publish the @runecraft/guild package.

steps.prompt: Ask the user which version segment to bump (patch, minor, major). Apply the bump to packages/guild/package.json.
From the repo root, run `bun run test`. If any test fails, stop the workflow and report the failing test.
From packages/guild, run `bun run schema:config:check`. If the schema is out of date, run `bun run schema:config` and commit the result.
Show the diff and the version bump. Wait for the user to confirm before publishing.
From packages/guild, run `bun run publish`. Verify the version on npm matches package.json.
